calendar.matters:
COMPLIANCE HEARING
Off Calendar Dec-02-2025 Continued To Oct-02-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-30-2025 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-09-2025 Continued To Jan-21-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement And Request For Attorney'S Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Oct-03-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. Kirk Donnelly, Esq. of Law Offices of J. Kirk Donnelly, APC (tel: 760-209-5894) for the Plaintiff.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF HUGO RIVERA LIMA INDIVIDUALLY AND ON BEHALF OF ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED's Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement And Request For Attorney's Fees And Costs.

Matter discussed as to a proposed order. The Court instructs counsel to submit a standalone proposed order and a standalone proposed judgment. Upon conclusion, the Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed motion for final approval is granted. The court will sign an appropriate order. The court sets a compliance hearing on July 14, 2026. The settlement administrator is ordered to submit a declaration concerning payments at least five court days in advance of the continued hearing date.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

FINAL APPROVAL HEARING
Off Calendar Oct-03-2025 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-08-2025 Continued To Oct-22-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar May-02-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RE: PLAINTIFF HUGO RIVERA LIMA INDIVIDUALLY AND ON BEHALF OF ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The court adopts its tentative ruling. The unopposed motion is granted. The court will endorse the proposed order lodged with the moving papers.

Judge: Christine Van Aken. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/CVA)
